name: SanMar Config
description: SanMar API credentials and sync settings. One record, singleton.

fields.label: SanMar Username
fields.description: Your SanMar account username (same as sanmar.com login)

fields.label: REST Base URL
fields.description: Override only if SanMar provides a staging/sandbox URL

fields.label: SOAP WSDL URL
fields.description: Used only when API Mode = SOAP

fields.label: Enable Catalog Sync
fields.description: Pull SanMar styles into ERPNext Items daily

fields.label: Enable Pricing Sync
fields.description: Sync SanMar net prices into ERPNext Item Price list daily

fields.label: Enable Stock Cache
fields.description: Refresh live inventory cache every 30 minutes

fields.label: Enable Auto Purchase Order
fields.description: Automatically create a PO to SanMar when WO blanks are out of stock. Review carefully before enabling in production.

fields.label: Stock Cache TTL (minutes)
fields.description: How long a cached inventory reading is considered fresh

fields.label: ERPNext Supplier (SanMar)
fields.description: The ERPNext Supplier record that represents SanMar for PO creation

fields.label: ERPNext Price List
fields.description: Price list where SanMar net prices are stored

fields.label: Receiving Warehouse
fields.description: Default warehouse for SanMar purchase receipts

fields.label: Default Item Group
fields.description: ERPNext Item Group used when creating new items from SanMar catalog

fields.label: Styles to Sync (comma-separated)
fields.description: Leave blank to sync all styles. Example: PC61,PC54,DT6000,ST650

fields.label: Brands to Sync (comma-separated)
fields.description: Example: Port & Company,District,Sport-Tek. Leave blank for all brands.
